## reference · Zeigarnik Effect

* People remember uncompleted or interrupted tasks better than completed tasks.
* Provide clear signifiers of additional content to invite content discovery.
* Artificial progress towards a goal motivates users to complete tasks.
* Clear indication of progress motivates users to complete tasks.

Sources: https://lawsofux.com/zeigarnik-effect/
